case_title: SHARPE'S CONSTRUCTION COMPANY et al VS. REYNALDO YBANEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-08-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-24-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-17-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST NICHOLAS AGBABIAKA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-17-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-01-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-08-2004 CONTINUED TO FEB-07-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARPE'S CONSTRUCTION COMPANY AGBABIAKA, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT YBANEZ, REYNALDO MATIAS, RELUCIO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-24-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-09-2004
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-11-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2005 CONTINUED TO APR-11-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-11-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LAVON GRANGER. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-17-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-08-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST NICHOLAS AGBABIAKA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-07-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-22-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CHRISTINA PAXTON. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: LaVon Granger. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Continued To Apr-11-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/11/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2004 Continued To Feb-07-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Nicholas Agbabiaka, appearing in Propria Persona. The OSC is re-set to 2/7/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. VanSteenberge. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2004 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-08-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2004 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by : Vicki Gross (212)
